title: Files, Paths, CSV, JSON, and Data Boundaries · Changed-Input Lab
summary: Import, validate, transform, and safely publish local nonprofit program data. The scenario, data, constraints, and failure modes differ from the workshop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of a repeatable data-quality reporting pipeline with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use pathlib to compose, inspect, resolve, traverse, and constrain filesystem paths portably.
Open text or binary files with explicit mode, encoding, newline, and context-managed lifetime.
Process large files incrementally and choose whole-file reads only when bounded size and simplicity justify them.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""python-basics cumulative stakeholder program."""

from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any

# Add one tested, typed, inspectable program increment per activity.
